ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Whether to auto refresh the file view when the file is changed.
ast.target: 当文件更改时是否自动刷新文件视图。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: ⚠️ This may cause flickering or losing some UI state such as the cursor position.
ast.target: ⚠️ 这可能会导致闪烁或丢失一些 UI 状态，例如光标位置。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: How to auto refresh the view.
ast.target: 如何自动刷新视图。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Whether to refresh the markdown view in Source / Live Preview mode, if auto refresh is enabled.
ast.target: 如果启用自动刷新，是否在源模式/实时预览模式下刷新 Markdown 视图。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Whether to use quick refresh for markdown view in Source / Live Preview mode.
ast.target: 是否在源模式/实时预览模式下对 Markdown 视图使用快速刷新。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: When enabled, custom panels in the markdown view might not be refreshed.
ast.target: 启用后，Markdown 视图中的自定义面板可能不会刷新。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: When disabled, the full markdown view refreshing is performed, but it may cause flickering or losing some UI state such as the cursor position.
ast.target: 禁用后将执行完整的 Markdown 视图刷新，但可能会导致闪烁或丢失一些 UI 状态，例如光标位置。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: View types to include for auto refresh.
ast.target: 自动刷新要包含的视图类型。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Insert each view type on a new line
ast.target: 每个视图类型另起一行插入

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: You can find the view type of a view via its context menu command
ast.target: 你可以通过其上下文菜单命令找到视图的视图类型

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: View types to exclude for auto refresh.
ast.target: 自动刷新时要排除的视图类型。

ast.name: error
ast.source: No Intl support, please use an Intl polyfill!
ast.target: 不支持 Intl，请使用 Intl polyfill！

ast.name: info
ast.source: 🌐 i18next is maintained with support from Locize — consider powering your project with managed localization (AI, CDN, integrations): https://locize.com 💙
ast.target: 🌐 i18next 在 Locize 的支持下维护——考虑使用托管本地化（AI、CDN、集成）为你的项目助力：https://locize.com 💙

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Interval in seconds to auto refresh the view(s).
ast.target: 自动刷新视图的时间间隔（秒）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to load deferred views on auto refresh
ast.target: 自动刷新时是否加载延迟视图

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to load deferred views on start
ast.target: 启动时是否加载延迟视图

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Should auto refresh on file change
ast.target: 文件更改时自动刷新

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Auto refresh mode
ast.target: 自动刷新模式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Auto refresh interval (seconds)
ast.target: 自动刷新间隔（秒）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Should auto refresh markdown view in Source / Live Preview mode
ast.target: 在源代码/实时预览模式下自动刷新 Markdown 视图

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Should use quick markdown view refresh
ast.target: 应使用快速 Markdown 视图刷新

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Should load deferred views on auto refresh
ast.target: 应在自动刷新时加载延迟视图

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Should load deferred views on start
ast.target: 应在启动时加载延迟视图

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include view types for auto refresh
ast.target: 为自动刷新包含视图类型

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Exclude view types for auto refresh
ast.target: 为自动刷新排除视图类型

ast.source:
markdown
canvas
ast.target:
markdown
画布

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source:
file-explorer
search
ast.target:
文件浏览器
搜索

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Refresh view
ast.target: 刷新视图

ast.name: warn
ast.source: accessing an object - but returnObjects options is not enabled!
ast.target: 正在访问一个对象——但未启用 returnObjects 选项！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着你的设置有问题。你在 i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage 完成之前就访问了 t 函数。请等待回调或 Promise 解决后再访问！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No backend was added via i18next.use. Will not load resources.
ast.target: 未通过 i18next.use 添加后端。不会加载资源。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: no languageDetector is used and no lng is defined
ast.target: init：未使用 languageDetector 且未定义 lng

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: i18next is already initialized. You should call init just once!
ast.target: init：i18next 已经初始化。你只应调用 init 一次！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hasLoadedNamespace: i18next was not initialized
ast.target: hasLoadedNamespace：i18next 未初始化

ast.name: warn
ast.source: I18N was not initialized, initializing default obsidian-dev-utils translations
ast.target: I18N 未初始化，正在初始化默认的 obsidian-dev-utils 翻译

ast.name: name
ast.source: Refresh active view
ast.target: 刷新活动视图

ast.name: name
ast.source: Refresh all open views
ast.target: 刷新所有打开的视图

ast.name: name
ast.source: Refresh all visible views
ast.target: 刷新所有可见视图
